name: State Fair of Texas
city:
Fair Park
1300 Robert B Cullum Boulevard
Dallas, TX 75210
description: The State Fair of Texas is an annual state fair held in Dallas at historic Fair Park.  The fair has taken place every year since 1886 except for varying periods during World War I and World War II as well as 2020, due to the COVID-19 pandemic.  It usually begins the last Friday in September and ends 24 days later.
